content.hint: 承认问题并承诺具体改进行动，使用 'I'll + 具体行动' 结构
content.situation: 经理指出员工在报告中缺乏数据支持，建议未来加强分析深度。
content.speakerText: I noticed your recent reports don't include enough data to back up your conclusions.
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你最近的报告中缺乏足够的数据来支持你的结论。
content.knowledgePoint: 用具体行动回应建设性反馈
content.responseTemplate: You're right — I'll ___ for the next one.

content.hint: 表达感谢并承诺调整沟通方式，关键词为 'use a more ___ tone'
content.situation: 经理提醒员工在邮件沟通中语气有时显得生硬，建议更注重表达方式。
content.speakerText: I’ve noticed your emails can come across as a bit blunt — it might affect team morale.
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你的邮件有时显得太直接，可能会影响团队氛围。
content.knowledgePoint: 承认问题并表达改进意愿
content.responseTemplate: Thanks for pointing that out — I'll ___ in my next emails.

content.hint: 表达感激并承诺参与，常用短语为 'speak up' 表示‘主动发言’
content.situation: 经理反馈员工在项目复盘时很少主动分享经验，鼓励其更积极参与。
content.speakerText: I’d love to hear more from you during project retrospectives — your experience is really valuable.
content.speakerTextCn: 我希望在项目复盘时能多听到你的分享，你的经验非常宝贵。
content.responseTemplate: That means a lot — I'll ___ more in the next session.

content.hint: 表达‘变得更好’的常用搭配
content.template: You're right — I’ve been nervous about it. I’d like to ___ better at receiving feedback.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：get better at doing something

content.hint: 为会议做准备的常用动词
content.template: That makes sense — I’ll ___ talking points ahead of the next meeting.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：prepare talking points（准备发言要点）

content.hint: 表达‘努力改进’的常用搭配
content.template: I appreciate the feedback — I’ll ___ to improve.
